name: Brown Rice Seafood Salad Supreme
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Shrimp, cooked, shelled and deveined
1/2 cup Red pepper, cut into julienne strips
1 cup Jarlsberg cheese, cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except dressing and greens.
2. Pour dressing over all and toss to blend.
3. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour to blend flavors.
4. To serve, spoon onto crisp greens. Makes 4-6 servings.
Dressing
In a medium bowl, combine 1 cup plain yogurt, 1/2 cup chopped seeded cucumber, 1/4 cup chopped green onion, 3 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 tablespoons light soy sauce and a generous dash of lemon pepper. Blend well.
